ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Todd Jenks, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
